articles.title: Trump loomed over the World Cup, up until the awkward trophy ceremony - The Washington Post
articles.description: The president was loudly booed as he entered the field after Spain's win, waving to people as he made his way to the stage.
articles.content:
EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. President Donald Trumps World Cup ended with something he likely loved: being showered in gold.
